title: Lithium Tabulator Table Definition Schema
description: Validates per-query/table column definition files. Each file defines how a specific query's result set maps to a Tabulator table, referencing coltypes for formatting.

table.description: Unique identifier for this table definition (kebab-case)

title.description: Human-readable title displayed in the UI

queryRef.description: Primary query reference number to fetch list data

searchQueryRef.description: Query reference number for search/filter operations (optional — falls back to queryRef with params)

detailQueryRef.description: Query reference number to fetch full row details on selection

readonly.description: When true, the entire table is read-only regardless of individual column settings

selectableRows.description: Number of rows that can be selected simultaneously (1 for single, true for multi, false for none)

responsiveLayout.description: How columns respond to narrow widths

resizableColumns.description: Whether users can resize columns by dragging

persistSort.description: Remember sort state across data reloads

persistFilter.description: Remember filter state across data reloads

initialSort.description: Default sort order when data is first loaded

groupBy.description: Field name(s) to group rows by (string or array of strings)

columns.description: Column definitions keyed by field name from the query result

display.description: Column header title displayed to the user

field.description: Field name in the query result data (must match JSON key from API)

coltype.description: Reference to a coltype defined in coltypes.json (e.g., 'integer', 'string', 'lookup')

visible.description: Whether the column is visible by default (can be toggled via column chooser)

filter.description: Whether the column has a header filter

group.description: Whether the column can be used as a grouping field

editable.description: Whether the column is editable (subject to table-level readonly and permissions)

calculated.description: Whether the value is server-calculated (computed columns, timestamps, etc.) — always non-editable

primaryKey.description: Whether this field is the primary key (used for API update/delete operations)

lookupRef.description: For lookup coltypes: the lookup table reference (e.g., 'a27', 'a28')

overrides.description: Coltype property overrides for this specific column. Any coltype property can be overridden here.
